content: Hi all, thanks so much for all your efforts, it's really nice and ergonomic working with Rust-for-Linux. After watching the great talk from @Wedson Almeida Filho at https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-l-8WrGHEGI I made some docs on how to write a kernel module: https://www.jackos.io/rust-kernel/rust-for-linux.html
Please raise a pull request or issue here if you find anything wrong in there
